html: and in shorter form Eshtemoh (obedience), a town of Judah in the mountains, (Joshua 15:50) allotted to the priest. (Joshua 21:14; 1�Chronicles 6:57) It was one of the places frequented by David and his followers during the long period of their wanderings. (1�Samuel 30:28) comp. 1Sam 30:31 Its site is at Semu�a , a village seven miles south of Hebron.
